notes: Official Arkansas Geographic Information Systems Office statewide cadastral parcel publication. The layer exposes owner name and situs/property address fields from county assessor CAMA rolls; Arkansas is stored as a config-level literal state because the layer has no state column. User approved this source for local ingestion on 2026-06-21; commercial/public republication, protected-address handling, and ongoing terms compliance remain operator responsibilities. Address fields are source-observed situs/property context, not confirmed residence.
